signals.raw:
SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The SEC's decision to drop its lawsuit against Ripple has been confirmed as a key catalyst for XRP's April 2026 surge, with the cryptocurrency gaining nearly 10% in the past week to ~$1.42 after breaking $1.50 resistance[1][2].
